description: KA Metrics — Phase 4 of Khalid→KA rebrand (replaces justhodl-khalid-metrics). Daily at 11 UTC, computes 60+ FRED + Polygon metrics, publishes data/khalid-metrics.json + data/ka-metrics.json (and analysis variants when triggered with action=analyze). Serves /ka/ frontend page.
